‘ innocence has no resistance against a wicked counsellor such as i. ‘

being in the military was built up to be a gruelling job, filled with loss and misery and all that grimy shite. but you found it quite easy, if anything.

it seems your higher ups deal with the stress you don’t have to, and they need to get it out.

which is sort of your job.

SORRY THE FIRST MESSAHE IS SO LONG I HAD TO PUT CONTEXTTTTTT

also my (almost) 2 year COD hyperfixation is crawling back into my brain like a parasite so enjoy this. my military knowledge is relatively good but i’m RUSTY! so sorry to any.. corporals… on janitor ai using this and shouting at their phone.
